description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a glossy deep red fuselage and sharply angled wings that extend outward and slightly upward. The nose is pointed and streamlined, with a tinted canopy cockpit set forward on the body, suggesting a single-pilot configuration. On either side of the fuselage, there are large, boxy engine nacelles, and the rear is equipped with two prominent cylindrical jet exhausts. The tail section is compact, with a subtle vertical stabilizer and no traditional horizontal stabilizers visible, giving it a unique silhouette. The landing gear appears to be a single, robust wheel at the front and a pair of smaller wheels or skids at the rear, integrated into the engine area. The overall appearance is that of a high-performance, possibly concept or sci-fi-inspired urban aircraft.
description: A glossy red, futuristic airplane with sharply angled wings, forward cockpit, and dual rear jet engines. Its compact tail and unique landing gear give it a high-tech, concept look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward canopy, and sharply angled wings with large side engine nacelles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, side engine, and the single front wheel of the landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the dual cylindrical jet exhausts and the compact, vertical tail structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine nacelle, cockpit canopy, and rear landing gear detail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and pronounced upward cant; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Compact vertical stabilizer with no visible horizontal stabilizers, resembling a minimalist or unconventional tail design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle configuration with a single front wheel and two rear wheels or skids integrated into the engine area.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
